label: particle_shm
objective: Understand 1D SHM of a particle between limits -A and +A about origin O.

keyLabels.description: Mean (equilibrium) position is the origin O.

explainTop: The particle oscillates along the x-axis between -A and +A. Displacement is always measured from O (the mean position).
explainBottom: x(t) gives instantaneous displacement, not total distance traveled over time.

checkpointQuestions.prompt: Can you identify an instant when the particle is near origin O (x close to 0)?
checkpointQuestions.success: Correct: when x ~ 0, the particle is at the mean position O.
checkpointQuestions.hint: Watch the moving particle and the x(t) badge until the value approaches 0.

takeaway: Motion is bounded between fixed limits -A and +A.
x = 0 marks the mean position at origin O.
x(t) is displacement from O at each instant.
